4f:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Module-Level Convenience Functions"}]
50:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne provides module-level functions that operate on a default instance:"}]
51:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import remember, recall, get_context, get_stats\nfrom mnemosyne import forget, update, sleep\nfrom mnemosyne import scratchpad_write, scratchpad_read, scratchpad_clear\n\n# These are equivalent to using Mnemosyne() with session_id=\"default\"\nremember(\"Some important fact\")\nresults = recall(\"important fact\")\n","language":"python"}]
